lessonHeader.title: Grammar
lessonHeader.titleTranslation: Future time (present continuous, will, be going to, present simple)
lessonHeader.titleTranslation_ru: Future time (present continuous, will, be going to, present simple)

sections.instruction_ru: Форму Present Continuous смотрите в разделе 1.

tip.label: Watch out!
tip.translation:
• Kelajakda qilmoqchi bo'lgan, lekin hali kelishilmagan (niyatlar) ishlarni aytganda Present Continuous ishlatmaymiz. Be going to ishlatamiz.
✗ _I'm becoming an explorer when I grow up._
✓ _I'm **going to** become an explorer when I grow up._

• Bashoratlar uchun Present Continuous ishlatmaymiz. Will yoki be going to ishlatamiz.
✗ _Do you think you're enjoying your trip to Berlin next week?_
✓ _Do you think you **will** enjoy your trip to Berlin next week?_
tip.translation_ru:
• Мы не используем Present Continuous для намерений, которые ещё не согласованы. Мы используем be going to.
✗ _I'm becoming an explorer when I grow up._
✓ _I'm **going to** become an explorer when I grow up._

• Мы не используем Present Continuous для предсказаний. Мы используем will или be going to.
✗ _Do you think you're enjoying your trip to Berlin next week?_
✓ _Do you think you **will** enjoy your trip to Berlin next week?_

cells: _The new airport **will** be the biggest in Europe._
_You'll have a great time in the Bahamas._
_We'll help you get ready for your holiday._
_I know! I'll go to China this summer!_

tip.label: Watch out!
tip.translation:
• Taklif va iltimoslar so'roq gap bo'lsa, will bilan emas, shall bilan ishlatamiz (I va we bilan).
✓ _**Shall** I drive you to the airport?_

• Kelishilgan rejalar (arrangements) uchun will ishlatmaymiz:
✗ _We'll visit my grandma this weekend._
tip.translation_ru:
• С предложениями и просьбами в вопросах мы используем shall (с I и we), а не will.
✓ _**Shall** I drive you to the airport?_

• Мы не используем will для договорённостей:
✗ _We'll visit my grandma this weekend._

sections.instruction_ru: be going to + инфинитив без частицы to

cells:
I **am ('m) going to** travel ...
He/she/it **is ('s) going to** travel ...
You/we/they **are ('re) going to** travel ...

I **am ('m) not going to** travel ...
He/she/it **is not (isn't / 's not) going to** travel ...
You/we/they **are not (aren't / 're not) going to** travel ...

**Am** I **going to** travel ...?
**Is** he/she/it **going to** travel ...?
**Are** you/we/they **going to** travel ...?

I **am ('m) not going to** travel ...
He/she/it **is not (isn't / 's not) going to** travel ...
You/we/they **are not (aren't / 're not) going to** travel ...

**Am** I **going to** travel ...?
**Is** he/she/it **going to** travel ...?
**Are** you/we/they **going to** travel ...?
cells_ru:
I **am ('m) going to** travel ...
He/she/it **is ('s) going to** travel ...
You/we/they **are ('re) going to** travel ...

I **am ('m) not going to** travel ...
He/she/it **is not (isn't / 's not) going to** travel ...
You/we/they **are not (aren't / 're not) going to** travel ...

**Am** I **going to** travel ...?
**Is** he/she/it **going to** travel ...?
**Are** you/we/they **going to** travel ...?

cells: _I'm **going to** become an explorer when I grow up._
Predictions (often with evidence we can see)
_It's **going to** rain, so take an umbrella._
cells_uz: Bashoratlar (ko'pincha ko'rish mumkin bo'lgan dalillar bilan)

cells: _The new airport **is going to** be the biggest in Europe._

sections.instruction_ru: Форму Present Simple смотрите в разделе 1.
